chunks.title: Human Plans and Divine Sovereignty
chunks.reason: A cohesive argument contrasting human planning with God's ultimate direction of steps.

chunks.title: Wisdom for Kings and Rulers
chunks.reason: A collection of proverbs specifically addressing the conduct and judgment of kings.

chunks.title: The Value of Wisdom and Speech
chunks.reason: An exhortation to pursue wisdom over gold and the power of wise speech.

chunks.title: The Wicked and Their Ways
chunks.reason: A series of warnings describing the deceptive and destructive nature of the wicked.

chunks.title: Righteousness and Divine Control
chunks.reason: Concluding verses on the honor of age, self-control, and God's sovereignty over chance.
